name: Jitsi Meet
description: Self-hosted, end-to-end secure video conferencing — no account required.
compose:
name: "slashnode-jitsi"
services:
  jitsi-web:
    image: "jitsi/web:stable-9646"
    container_name: "jitsi-web"
    restart: "unless-stopped"
    networks:
      - slashnode
    ports:
      - "8442:80"
    volumes:
      - "jitsi-web-config:/config"
    environment:
      PUBLIC_URL: "${self.exports.url}"
      TZ: "UTC"
      ENABLE_LETSENCRYPT: "0"
      ENABLE_HTTP_REDIRECT: "0"
      ENABLE_XMPP_WEBSOCKET: "1"
      XMPP_DOMAIN: "meet.jitsi"
      XMPP_AUTH_DOMAIN: "auth.meet.jitsi"
      XMPP_BOSH_URL_BASE: "http://prosody:5280"
      XMPP_GUEST_DOMAIN: "guest.meet.jitsi"
      XMPP_MUC_DOMAIN: "muc.meet.jitsi"
      XMPP_RECORDER_DOMAIN: "recorder.meet.jitsi"
      JICOFO_AUTH_USER: "focus"
  prosody:
    image: "jitsi/prosody:stable-9646"
    container_name: "prosody"
    restart: "unless-stopped"
    networks:
      - slashnode
    volumes:
      - "jitsi-prosody-config:/config"
    environment:
      TZ: "UTC"
      AUTH_TYPE: "internal"
      ENABLE_AUTH: "0"
      ENABLE_GUESTS: "1"
      XMPP_DOMAIN: "meet.jitsi"
      XMPP_AUTH_DOMAIN: "auth.meet.jitsi"
      XMPP_GUEST_DOMAIN: "guest.meet.jitsi"
      XMPP_MUC_DOMAIN: "muc.meet.jitsi"
      XMPP_INTERNAL_MUC_DOMAIN: "internal-muc.meet.jitsi"
      XMPP_RECORDER_DOMAIN: "recorder.meet.jitsi"
      JICOFO_COMPONENT_SECRET: "${secret.JICOFO_COMPONENT_SECRET}"
      JICOFO_AUTH_USER: "focus"
      JICOFO_AUTH_PASSWORD: "${secret.JICOFO_AUTH_PASSWORD}"
      JVB_AUTH_USER: "jvb"
      JVB_AUTH_PASSWORD: "${secret.JVB_AUTH_PASSWORD}"
      JVB_BREWERY_MUC: "jvbbrewery"
  jicofo:
    image: "jitsi/jicofo:stable-9646"
    container_name: "jicofo"
    restart: "unless-stopped"
    networks:
      - slashnode
    volumes:
      - "jitsi-jicofo-config:/config"
    environment:
      TZ: "UTC"
      ENABLE_AUTH: "0"
      XMPP_SERVER: "prosody"
      XMPP_DOMAIN: "meet.jitsi"
      XMPP_AUTH_DOMAIN: "auth.meet.jitsi"
      XMPP_INTERNAL_MUC_DOMAIN: "internal-muc.meet.jitsi"
      XMPP_MUC_DOMAIN: "muc.meet.jitsi"
      JICOFO_COMPONENT_SECRET: "${secret.JICOFO_COMPONENT_SECRET}"
      JICOFO_AUTH_USER: "focus"
      JICOFO_AUTH_PASSWORD: "${secret.JICOFO_AUTH_PASSWORD}"
      JVB_BREWERY_MUC: "jvbbrewery"
  jvb:
    image: "jitsi/jvb:stable-9646"
    container_name: "jvb"
    restart: "unless-stopped"
    networks:
      - slashnode
    ports:
      - "10000:10000/udp"
    volumes:
      - "jitsi-jvb-config:/config"
    environment:
      TZ: "UTC"
      XMPP_SERVER: "prosody"
      XMPP_AUTH_DOMAIN: "auth.meet.jitsi"
      XMPP_INTERNAL_MUC_DOMAIN: "internal-muc.meet.jitsi"
      JVB_AUTH_USER: "jvb"
      JVB_AUTH_PASSWORD: "${secret.JVB_AUTH_PASSWORD}"
      JVB_BREWERY_MUC: "jvbbrewery"
      JVB_PORT: "10000"
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  jitsi-web-config:
    name: "slashnode-jitsi_jitsi_jitsi-web-config"
  jitsi-prosody-config:
    name: "slashnode-jitsi_jitsi_jitsi-prosody-config"
  jitsi-jicofo-config:
    name: "slashnode-jitsi_jitsi_jitsi-jicofo-config"
  jitsi-jvb-config:
    name: "slashnode-jitsi_jitsi_jitsi-jvb-config"
notes:
Jitsi's components authenticate to each other with internal secrets, all generated automatically — view and copy them under the View tab → Parameters:
• JICOFO_AUTH_PASSWORD — Jicofo (the conference focus) logging in to Prosody (XMPP).
• JVB_AUTH_PASSWORD — the video bridge logging in to Prosody.
• JICOFO_COMPONENT_SECRET — Jicofo's XMPP component secret.
You normally don't need to enter these anywhere; they just wire the services together.
